# Port target: `@angular-eslint/eslint-plugin-template`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint |
| Submodule | `upstream/angular-eslint` @ `v22.0.0` (`packages/eslint-plugin-template`) |
| Baseline npm version | `22.0.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 39 |

> Template lint rules target Angular templates rather than JS/TS AST nodes.

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `alt-text` | [Accessibility] Enforces alternate text for elements which require the alt, aria-label, aria-labelledby attributes. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/alt-text.md) |
| 2 | `attributes-order` | Ensures that HTML attributes and Angular bindings are sorted based on an expected order | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/attributes-order.md) |
| 3 | `banana-in-box` | Ensures that the two-way data binding syntax is correct | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/banana-in-box.md) |
| 4 | `button-has-type` | Ensures that a button has a valid type specified | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/button-has-type.md) |
| 5 | `click-events-have-key-events` | [Accessibility] Ensures that the click event is accompanied with at least one key event keyup, keydown or keypress. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/click-events-have-key-events.md) |
| 6 | `conditional-complexity` | The conditional complexity should not exceed a rational limit | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/conditional-complexity.md) |
| 7 | `cyclomatic-complexity` | Checks cyclomatic complexity against a specified limit. It is a quantitative measure of the number of linearly independent paths through a program's source code | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/cyclomatic-complexity.md) |
| 8 | `elements-content` | [Accessibility] Ensures that the heading, anchor and button elements have content in them | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/elements-content.md) |
| 9 | `eqeqeq` | Requires `===` and `!==` in place of `==` and `!=` | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/eqeqeq.md) |
| 10 | `i18n` | Ensures following best practices for i18n. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/i18n.md) |
| 11 | `interactive-supports-focus` | [Accessibility] Ensures that elements with interactive handlers like `(click)` are focusable. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/interactive-supports-focus.md) |
| 12 | `label-has-associated-control` | [Accessibility] Ensures that a label element/component is associated with a form element | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/label-has-associated-control.md) |
| 13 | `mouse-events-have-key-events` | [Accessibility] Ensures that the mouse events \`${MouseEvents.MouseOut}\` and \`${MouseEvents.MouseOver}\` are accompanied by \`${KeyEvents.Focus}\` and \`${KeyEvents.Blur}\` events respectively. Coding for the keyboard is important for users with physical disabilities who cannot use a mouse, AT compatibility, and screenreader users. See more at ${STYLE_GUIDE_LINK} | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/mouse-events-have-key-events.md) |
| 14 | `no-any` | The use of "${ANY_TYPE_CAST_FUNCTION_NAME}" nullifies the compile-time benefits of Angular's type system | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-any.md) |
| 15 | `no-autofocus` | [Accessibility] Ensures that the `autofocus` attribute is not used | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-autofocus.md) |
| 16 | `no-call-expression` | Disallows calling expressions in templates, except for output handlers | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-call-expression.md) |
| 17 | `no-distracting-elements` | [Accessibility] Enforces that no distracting elements are used | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-distracting-elements.md) |
| 18 | `no-duplicate-attributes` | Ensures that there are no duplicate input properties or output event listeners | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-duplicate-attributes.md) |
| 19 | `no-empty-control-flow` | Ensures that control flow blocks are not empty. Empty control flow blocks usually occur due to refactoring that wasn't completed. They can cause confusion when reading code. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-empty-control-flow.md) |
| 20 | `no-inline-styles` | Disallows the use of inline styles in HTML templates | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-inline-styles.md) |
| 21 | `no-interpolation-in-attributes` | Ensures that property-binding is used instead of interpolation in attributes. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-interpolation-in-attributes.md) |
| 22 | `no-negated-async` | Ensures that async pipe results, as well as values used with the async pipe, are not negated | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-negated-async.md) |
| 23 | `no-nested-tags` | Denies nesting of `<p>` and `<a>` tags. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-nested-tags.md) |
| 24 | `no-non-null-assertion` | Disallows the non-null assertion operator (!) in templates | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-non-null-assertion.md) |
| 25 | `no-positive-tabindex` | Ensures that the `tabindex` attribute is not positive | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/no-positive-tabindex.md) |
| 26 | `prefer-at-else` | Prefer using `@else` instead of a second `@if` with the opposite condition to reduce code and make it easier to read. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-at-else.md) |
| 27 | `prefer-at-empty` | Prefer using `@empty` with `@for` loops instead of a separate `@if` or `@else` block to reduce code and make it easier to read. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-at-empty.md) |
| 28 | `prefer-built-in-pipes` | Encourages the use of Angular built-in pipes (e.g. lowercase, uppercase, titlecase) instead of certain JavaScript methods in Angular templates. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-built-in-pipes.md) |
| 29 | `prefer-class-binding` | Suggests using [class] bindings over ngClass where applicable | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-class-binding.md) |
| 30 | `prefer-contextual-for-variables` | Ensures that contextual variables are used in @for blocks where possible instead of aliasing them. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-contextual-for-variables.md) |
| 31 | `prefer-control-flow` | Ensures that the built-in control flow is used. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-control-flow.md) |
| 32 | `prefer-ngsrc` | Ensures ngSrc is used instead of src for img elements | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-ngsrc.md) |
| 33 | `prefer-self-closing-tags` | Ensures that self-closing tags are used for elements with a closing tag but no content. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-self-closing-tags.md) |
| 34 | `prefer-static-string-properties` | Ensures that static string values use property assignment instead of property binding. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-static-string-properties.md) |
| 35 | `prefer-template-literal` | Ensure that template literals are used instead of concatenating strings or expressions. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/prefer-template-literal.md) |
| 36 | `role-has-required-aria` | [Accessibility] Ensures elements with ARIA roles have all required properties for that role. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/role-has-required-aria.md) |
| 37 | `table-scope` | [Accessibility] Ensures that the `scope` attribute is only used on the `<th>` element | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/table-scope.md) |
| 38 | `use-track-by-function` | Ensures trackBy function is used | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/use-track-by-function.md) |
| 39 | `valid-aria` | [Accessibility] Ensures that correct ARIA attributes and respective values are used | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin-template/docs/rules/valid-aria.md) |
